mood: Sharp, precise, trustworthy, analytical, warm techno

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Asymmetrical Bento Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 inside cards. No cramped elements.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned typography. No centered paragraphs.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-md for internal badges

landing_features_grid.description: 6-card grid with squarish colored numbered tabs exactly as requested.
landing_features_grid.card_style: bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6

dashboard_cards.description: Clean white cards, sharp or slightly rounded corners. Left aligned data.
dashboard_cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm

product_badges.description: Pill or sharp-edged. Font: JetBrains Mono.

variants.#1: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded
variants.F (Фулфілмент): bg-teal-50 text-teal-700 border border-teal-200 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded
variants.#1 РЕКЛАМА: bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border border-orange-200 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded font-bold

top_sellers_list.description: Лідери продажів: Ranked list of sellers. Bold font for seller name.
top_sellers_list.marker_style: Left border marker (e.g. border-l-4) with assigned color per seller.

chrome_extension_popup.style: Compact version of the dashboard. bg-slate-50. Sticky header. Primary CTA spanning full width.

in_page_overlay.description: Floating panel in bottom right of Rozetka/Epicentr pages.
in_page_overlay.style: fixed bottom-4 right-4 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/95 border border-slate-200 shadow-xl rounded-xl p-4 w-[300px] z-[9999]

hero_background_abstract.description: Abstract geometric patterns in teal, orange, and white for landing page background layer

analytics_mockup_placeholder.description: Data analysis dashboard on a laptop for generic placeholders

development_instructions: Install and use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for standard text, 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers, metrics, and badges.
Use Recharts for the source distribution Donut/Bar chart (Топ продажів, Реклама, Rozetka, Інші, Фулфілмент), strictly using the colors array from this file.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements, buttons, and metrics cards (e.g., data-testid='scrape-button', data-testid='metric-avg-price').
For the Landing page 'Можливості' grid, strictly follow the color sequence for the numbered square tabs: 1 (emerald-700), 2 (teal-600), 3 (orange-600), 4 (teal-600), 5 (emerald-700), 6 (orange-600).
All text content must be in Ukrainian (e.g., 'Зведення по сторінці', 'Лідери продажів', 'Відгуки', 'Збереження').
Product table needs a filter for Rozetka/Epicentr.
Ensure Extension Popup matches exactly 320x500 resolution constraints, showing connection status, collected items counters, 'Зібрати дані' button, and link to dashboard.
